FlowUs
Next-Generation Knowledge Management and Collaboration Platform

Utilizes cloud-based notes along with online documents, knowledge base, folders, and other multi-functional features to provide a one-stop work center for digital information management and collaboration for individuals and teams.

Free to Use

Cloud Documents: Say Goodbye to Fragmented Management

Insert text, tables, code, audio/video, and web content with one click, supporting embedded third-party services to meet diverse creative needs. Not just an online document but a powerful creation and interaction tool.

Learn More

Enterprise Services:
Digital Collaboration Engine

By setting up team spaces, structuring and managing workflows, supporting multi-end real-time collaboration, and private deployment to build a one-stop work center for enterprises.

Learn More

Multi-Dimensional Table:
Let Information Come Alive

Integrates online collaboration, information management, and visualization views within traditional data management tables. Switch between various views with one click, and build personalized, lightweight business management systems.

Learn More

Folders:
Endless Resources at Your Fingertips

Supports high-speed upload, download, and preview of multiple file formats. Access, edit, share, and collaborate on files anytime, anywhere via computer or mobile phone.

Learn More

FlowUs Al:
Native Embedded Intelligent Assistant

Intelligently solves tasks in work, study, and daily life, showcasing the charm of future workflows.

Learn More

Everything is FlowUs

Quick Migration and Easy Start

Supports rapid migration, importing local files in CSV, Markdown, and other formats. Powerful data migration capabilities provide a cost-free new experience in knowledge management.

Try now

Embedded Web Pages for Seamless Aggregation

No extra clicks required. Aggregate all workflows into FlowUs using links.

Try now

Various Scenarios, Easy-to-Use Templates
Provides 100+ solution templates for seamless collaboration with one-click implementation.

View All Templates Try now
